allow:
Bash(git add src/App.jsx src/PricingWizard.jsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Improve readability and add mobile responsiveness

- Darken secondary text colors \(TXT2, --txt3\) for better contrast on white backgrounds
- Increase trust badge opacity from 0.5 to 0.7
- Add hamburger menu with animated open/close for mobile navbar
- Extract layout grids \(hero, stats, how-it-works, features\) to CSS classes with responsive breakpoints
- Fix AI panel overflow and shrink quote amount on small screens
- Add single-column fallback for tier grid on 360px screens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add src/PricingWizard.jsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add tool-calling agentic loop to AI chat advisor

The AI advisor can now act directly on the user's plan, not just advise:
- switch_tier: changes the selected IPD tier
- toggle_rider: adds/removes OPD, Dental, Maternity riders
- recalculate_quote: runs the pricing engine with merged pending changes
- navigate_to_step: moves the wizard to any step

Implements a multi-turn agentic loop \(max 5 iterations\) with tool_use
stop_reason handling. Action chips render inline in the chat showing
exactly what the agent did \(e.g. "Switched tier to Gold",
"Quote updated — $312/yr"\). A pendingChanges ref tracks in-flight state
mutations so recalculate_quote always uses the latest values even before
React re-renders settle. calculate\(\) now accepts an overrideInp param
and returns the result for use by the tool loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(rm "AI Underwriting Automation in Insurance.md" "AI Case Studies Reimagining Underwriting for the Digital Age - Actuaries Digital.md" "predictive-analytics-and-machine-learning - SOA.md")
